description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, integration, and publish, using the variables BUNDLE_PATH, DEBIAN_FRONTEND, DIGITALOCEAN_TESTBOX_FQDN, and KITCHEN_YAML as defined. In the build stage add a build-deb job that runs on the alpine:latest image and executes `apk update && apk add openssl make dpkg ca-certificates gnupg tar`, then `update-ca-certificates`, then `make deb`. In the integration stage add a kitchen-test-job that runs on ruby:2.4-alpine3.6, runs `apk update && apk add coreutils curl build-base openssh-client jq rsync`, then `make gems`, then `make kitchen`. In the publish stage add a publish job that runs on alpine:latest, is limited to the master branch, and runs `apk update && apk add make curl` followed by `make publish`. Apply a global cache for paths `$BUNDLE_PATH` and `$CI_PROJECT_DIR/data/`.
